briefdescription.para: This table contains the function pointers for all possible states.

detaileddescription.para: The order of elements must match the XSdi_MenuType enumerator definitions.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the SDI main menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the SDI subcores menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function displays the SDI main menu.
This function outputs the video information on TX and RX.
This function outputs the debug information.
This function takes care of the SDI menu initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdi_Menu instance.
points to the base address of PS uart.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the menu to the main menu.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to trigger the SDI menu statemachine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdi_Menu instance.
